label: META: schema for the new music-curated fields
input: (not run — describes the fields this fixture adds to SceneReleaseParse in Phase 1)

release._doc_strategy: music-curated — distinct from audio-heuristic; selected when the path looks like Artist/Release/Track and not like a scene release
release._doc_artist: artist display name with any (parenthetical disambiguator) stripped
release._doc_artistDisambiguation: the bare disambiguator text, e.g. 'Scottish DJ and producer' (no parens)
release._doc_album: release title alone (NOT 'Artist - Album'); audio-heuristic strategy still keeps the legacy 'Artist - Album' in title
release._doc_discNumber: int, default 1 when track file is matched; 0/omitted at release/artist scope
release._doc_trackNumber: int; 0 is allowed (real fixtures use '00 - …' for single-track releases)
release._doc_trackTitle: track title from the filename portion after 'NN - '
release._doc_lyrics_handling: .lrc files are tracked as lyrics sidecars (NOT tracks). Parser still extracts release context. Matcher pairs each .lrc with its same-basename audio sibling and stores the path on the track row (tracks.lyrics_path, Phase 2 schema).
release._doc_nfo_handling: album.nfo and artist.nfo are read by internal/nfo (Phase 2 extends ParsedNFO with music fields) and override path-derived data. NFO MBIDs feed the matcher's NFO-first lookup just like movies/TV. This fixture only asserts that the parser extracts release/artist context from the NFO's path; NFO content parsing is tested separately in internal/nfo/nfo_test.go.

label: structured album track: 4-digit prefix yields disc+track split
input: Calvin Harris (Scottish DJ and producer)/Calvin Harris - Album - 2012 - 18 Months/0101 - Green Valley.flac

label: structured album: disc 2 track 1 from 0201 prefix
input: Calvin Harris (Scottish DJ and producer)/Calvin Harris - Album - 2012 - 18 Months/0201 - 18 Months continuous mix.flac

label: structured album: 2-digit track within high range (0115 → disc 1, track 15)
input: Calvin Harris (Scottish DJ and producer)/Calvin Harris - Album - 2012 - 18 Months/0115 - Thinking About You.flac

label: structured single: 0101 prefix, only one track
input: Calvin Harris (Scottish DJ and producer)/Calvin Harris - Single - 2022 - Potion/0101 - Potion.flac

label: structured EP: capitalized kind 'EP' normalizes to lowercase
input: Charli XCX/Charli XCX - EP - 2016 - Vroom Vroom/0101 - Vroom Vroom.flac

label: structured release with 2-digit track prefix (sparse 'TT' instead of 'DDTT')
input: Ado/Ado - Album - 2020 - utsuseewa/01 - track one.flac

label: track number zero: '00 - Title' for single-track albums is preserved as 0
input: Ado/Ado - Album - 2020 - utsuseewa/00 - utsuseewa.flac

label: Japanese title preserved verbatim
input: Ado/Ado - うっせぇわ/01 - うっせぇわ.flac

label: sparse layout: 'Artist - Title' folder (no kind, no year)

label: title with parenthetical descriptor: '(From _BEYBLADE X_)' stays in album title
input: Ado/Ado - Stay Gold (From _BEYBLADE X_)/01 - Stay Gold (From _Beyblade X_).flac

label: title with '(feat. X)' suffix: parenthetical kept as part of title
input: Ado/Ado - Anemone (feat. Ado)/01 - Anemone.flac

label: Unicode right-single-quote in track title preserved
input: Calvin Harris (Scottish DJ and producer)/Calvin Harris - Album - 2012 - 18 Months/0113 - Let’s Go.flac

label: case-mismatch: artist folder 'Charli XCX' vs release folder 'Charli xcx'; release folder wins as display name

label: release folder alone (no track file): extracts release metadata, no track fields

label: artist folder alone (no release): no release parse, media=unknown without parent context

release.trackTitle: Lovers In A Past Life cassö Remix

label: .lrc lyrics sidecar: kept in audioExtensions for lyrics support; parser extracts release context but emits no track fields (matcher pairs it with the same-basename audio sibling)

label: album.nfo sidecar: parser extracts release context from the path; NFO XML content (MBIDs, canonical title, track list) is read by internal/nfo in Phase 2
input: Calvin Harris (Scottish DJ and producer)/Calvin Harris - Album - 2012 - 18 Months/album.nfo

label: artist.nfo sidecar: artist-scope context only; NFO XML content (artist MBID, biography, album roster) is read by internal/nfo in Phase 2

label: release-folder artwork (cover.jpg): no release parse from image alone; carries release context

label: artist-folder artwork (folder.jpg): no release fields, only artist context
input: Calvin Harris (Scottish DJ and producer)/folder.jpg

label: release folder with hyphenated kind segment that ISN'T 'Album|EP|Single' falls back to sparse
input: Some Artist/Some Artist - Live - 2023 - Live At Wembley/01 - Opening.flac

label: release folder with extra ' - ' segments in the title (no kind word) parses sparsely
